notes: Drying flooded transportation and vehicles (cars, vans, marine/boat, transport interiors) in Australian workshops. Metric, professional technicians in PPE, 230 V / AU equipment. Ventilation and airflow management, moisture monitoring and validation, protecting vehicle contents. Only real drying gear — air movers, dehumidifiers, flexible ducting, moisture meters. Bright, clean, professional.

images.context: Course hero image for 'Introduction to Drying Transportation and Vehicles'
images.prompt: Interior of an Australian auto restoration workshop where a professional technician in workwear dries a flooded passenger car after floodwater damage, all doors and boot open, compact air movers directed into the footwells and onto the seats, a portable dehumidifier beside the vehicle drying the carpets and upholstery, bright clean workshop, metric tools on a bench. Realistic documentary photography, mid-distance over-shoulder framing.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing/dramatic mould close-ups, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no readable number plates, no standing water inside the vehicle, no US power outlets

images.context: Module on ventilation and airflow management for larger transport and marine interiors
images.prompt: A professional restoration technician managing airflow inside a flooded small boat cabin at an Australian marina workshop, positioning air movers and flexible ducting to direct ventilation across damp upholstered berths and cabin lining, a dehumidifier running nearby, bright clean daylight through the hatch. Realistic photography, mid-distance hands-on-task framing.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing/dramatic mould close-ups, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no standing water, no US power outlets

images.context: Module on monitoring and validation of vehicle drying progress
images.prompt: Close mid-distance of a technician's gloved hands pressing a pin-type moisture meter into the damp carpet and seat base of a vehicle interior to validate drying progress, an air mover softly visible in the background, bright even light in an Australian workshop. Realistic photography, over-shoulder framing on the meter.
